accuracy_guardrails: For store counts and location lists, use LIVE CONTEXT Store directory (29 locations with city and mall names).
Do not invent in-store return/exchange policy details.
Preserve product taxonomy abbreviations exactly unless a business glossary confirms expansions.
When policies conflict, official website and latest policy pages should outrank this overview document.
suggested_answer_style: Direct answer first, then concise supporting detail. For uncertain or changing facts, recommend checking the official link or support contact.
